Body.Content:
With AI in SharePoint, you can find, analyze, and organize files all from chat. SharePoint understands complex requests like "rename these files by date" or "move old reports to an archive folder." It analyzes your library, suggests a plan, and executes it with your approval, saving you time and effort.

GA date: May CY2026

Preview date: April CY2026
